leadText: Soul-Heart redirects here. For the ending theme to Volcanion and the Mechanical Marvel, see Soul-Heart (song). Soul-Heart (Japanese: ソウルハート Soul-Heart) is an Ability introduced in Generation VII. It is the signature Ability of Magearna.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] Soul-Heart raises the user's Special Attack by one stage every time another Pokémon faints , which includes its allies and opponents. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Soul-Heart has no effect outside of battle.

sections.title: In battle
sections.text: In battle [ edit | edit source ] Soul-Heart raises the user's Special Attack by one stage every time another Pokémon faints , which includes its allies and opponents.
